tasks.title: Prisma schema: UserAppearanceSetting, UserBackupSetting, UserUsageSetting, ai_assistant, auto_m...
tasks.description:
Create ALL Prisma models for EPIC-007 in prisma/schema.prisma.

Models to create:
- UserAppearanceSetting: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- UserBackupSetting: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- UserUsageSetting: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- ai_assistant: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- auto_message: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- backup: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- business: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- business_profile: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- business_statistic: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- cart: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- contact_block: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- integration_feature: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- label: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- locale: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- notification_setting: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- payment: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- performance_requirement: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- product: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- quick_reply: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- report: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- smart_reply: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- sticker_pack: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- sticker_suggestion: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- whatsapp_user: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities

Include:
- All model fields with correct Prisma types (@id, @default, @unique, @db.*)
- All relations between models (1:1, 1:N, N:M)
- @@map() table name annotations
- Run: npx prisma generate after schema changes

  PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/preferences/theme — Update user theme preference
  GET /api/v1/users/me/language — Get user language preference
  PUT /api/v1/users/me/language — Update user language preference

  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/away-message — Create or update user's automatic away message configuration
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/away-message — Disable and remove user's automatic away message configuration
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/greeting-settings — Get greeting settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/greeting-settings — Update greeting settings
  GET /api/v1/users/{id}/accessibility-settings — Get accessibility settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/accessibility-settings — Update accessibility settings
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/preferences/typography — Get user typography preferences
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/preferences/typography — Update user typography preferences
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/power-settings — Get user battery settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/power-settings — Update user battery settings
  GET /api/v1/users/{id}/preferences/localization — Get user localization preferences
  PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/preferences/localization — Update user localization preferences
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/regional-formats — Get user regional format preferences
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/regional-formats — Update user regional format preferences
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/blocks — Block a contact
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/blocks — List blocked contacts
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/blocks/{contactId} — Unblock a contact
